task_completion.description: Create a new LibreOffice Master Document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Writer is open and the UI indicates a Master Document is being edited (e.g., the Master Document Navigator pane is visible, or the title bar indicates a new master document).
The Master Document Navigator pane shows '01_safety.odt' as an inserted/linked file, or the document content displays safety warnings about hydraulic fluid.
The Master Document Navigator pane shows '02_operation.odt' as an inserted/linked file, or the document content displays pump operation procedures mentioning 2000 PSI.
The Master Document Navigator pane shows '03_maintenance.odt' as an inserted/linked file, or the document content displays maintenance schedules mentioning part H-992.

task_completion.description: Ensure the linked files are in the exact order specified: safety, operation, maintenance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Master Document Navigator pane lists the files in the exact top-to-bottom order: '01_safety.odt', '02_operation.odt', '03_maintenance.odt'.

task_completion.description: Include a Table of Contents at the start of the manual.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Table of Contents is visible at the very beginning of the document page, or a 'Table of Contents' / 'Text' block is positioned above the linked files in the Navigator pane.

task_completion.description: Save the completed master document with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreOffice title bar shows 'hydra_manual_master.odm', or a 'Save As' dialog is visible saving the file as 'hydra_manual_master.odm' in '/home/ga/Documents/Hydra_Manual/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice graphical user interface to assemble the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the LibreOffice Writer application window being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or python scripts doing the assembly.

integrity.description: The agent used the Master Document linking feature rather than simply copy-pasting text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Navigator pane shows the source files as linked external documents (typically with link/file icons next to their names), rather than just showing plain text headings in a standard document.

integrity.description: The Table of Contents was generated using the application's TOC feature, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Table of Contents has the standard LibreOffice gray background (field shading) indicating it is a generated field, or the agent is seen using the 'Insert > Table of Contents and Index' menu.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The working directory is /home/ga/Documents/Hydra_Manual. The expected output file is hydra_manual_master.odm, which must be a valid ODF Master Document (application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.text-master). The source files to be linked are 01_safety.odt (contains safety warnings about hydraulic fluid), 02_operation.odt (contains pump operation procedures with 2000 PSI target pressure), and 03_maintenance.odt (contains maintenance schedules with part number H-992). The files must be linked in this exact order, with a Table of Contents at the start.
